title: Working Income Tax Benefit Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Working Income Tax Benefit Statistics
The Working Income Tax Benefit (WITB) statistics present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all individual WITB recipients. The data in the tables are taken from personal income tax returns that were processed for the tax year two years prior to the year of publication.
- 2020 Edition (2018 tax year)
- 2019 Edition (2017 tax year)
- 2018 Edition (2016 tax year)
- 2017 Edition (2015 tax year)
- 2016 Edition (2014 tax year)
- 2015 Edition (2013 tax year)
